name: mercer-status
description: Auto-check SymbolOS drift on startup and optionally launch the Mercer status UI.

mercerStatus.devMode.description: When true, enables verbose logging and extra notifications to help debug drift checks and task launching.

mercerStatus.autoLaunchOnDrift.description: When true, the extension will launch the 'Mercer: status UI (interactive)' task on startup only if drift is WARN/FAIL.

mercerStatus.notifyOnOk.description: When true, shows a small info message even when drift is OK.

mercerStatus.taskLabel.description: VS Code task label to execute when drift is WARN/FAIL.
